pageContext.name: Gundam Aerial Ver.A.N.I.M.E.
pageContext.description: The Gundam Aerial Action Figure joins the ROBOT SPIRITS ver.A.N.I.M.E. series, featuring all of the sharp sculpting and high posability fans have come to expect.  From Mobile Suit Gundam: The Witch from Mercury, this figure features accessory parts to let you re-create it's dynamic fighting style!
